title: Heimdall configuration
description: JSON Schema for heimdall.toml. Load via taplo: add '#:schema ./heimdall.toml.schema.json' as the first line of your TOML file, or configure the path in .taplo.toml.

server.description: Core server identity and runtime parameters.

identity.description: NSID value returned in EDNS responses (RFC 5001). Used to identify this node in anycast/multi-server deployments.

worker_threads.description: Number of Tokio worker threads. Defaults to the number of logical CPUs.

drain_grace_secs.description: Graceful shutdown drain timeout in seconds. After SIGTERM, in-flight queries are given this long to complete (BIN-048, OPS-001..006). Systemd TimeoutStopSec should be >= this value + 5.

roles.description: Resolver role flags. At least one must be true when [[listeners]] are configured.

recursive.description: Perform full recursive resolution with DNSSEC validation. Bind listeners to 127.0.0.1/::1 to prevent becoming an open resolver (specification/007 THREAT-035).

authoritative.description: Serve authoritative answers from zone files configured in [zones].

forwarder.description: Forward queries to upstream resolvers (configured in a future release).

listeners.description: Network listener bindings. At least one entry is required when a role is active. Ports below 1024 require CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE on Linux.

zones.description: Zone file loading. Requires roles.authoritative = true. Loaded at start-up; reloaded on SIGHUP.

zone_files.description: Zone files to load at start-up.

capacity.description: Maximum number of RRsets to hold in the in-memory cache.

min_ttl_secs.description: Minimum TTL enforced regardless of the wire value. In seconds.

max_ttl_secs.description: Maximum TTL enforced regardless of the wire value. In seconds.

serve_stale_secs.description: Serve stale cached answers this many seconds past expiry when the upstream is unreachable. Disabled by default (RFC 8767).

acl.description: Access control lists restricting which clients may send queries (specification/006).

rules.description: ACL rule strings in 'allow|deny CIDR' format.

responses_per_second.description: Maximum responses per second per /24 subnet. Requires enabled = true.

rpz.description: Response Policy Zone feeds for DNS firewall / blocking (specification/013-rpz.md).

observability.description: Prometheus metrics and optional OTLP distributed tracing. Binds to loopback by default (OPS-021, THREAT-028).

metrics_port.description: Prometheus text-format metrics exposition port. Curl: curl http://127.0.0.1:9090/metrics

tracing_otlp_endpoint.description: OTLP/gRPC endpoint for distributed tracing. Disabled when absent.

admin.description: Admin-RPC endpoint. Length-prefix-framed JSON over HTTP/2 (OPS-007..015). TLS material enables mTLS protection.

admin_port.description: Admin-RPC HTTP/2 port. Must not equal observability.metrics_port.

tls_cert.description: Path to PEM certificate chain for mTLS on the admin endpoint.

tls_key.description: Path to PEM private key for mTLS on the admin endpoint.

address.description: IP address to bind (IPv4 or IPv6).

port.description: Port to bind. Ports < 1024 require CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE on Linux.

udp_recv_buffer.description: UDP receive buffer size in bytes. Must be >= 4096. Default: 425984 (512 KiB - 512 B).

tls_cert.description: Path to PEM certificate chain file. Required for dot, doh, and doq transports.

tls_key.description: Path to PEM private key file. Required for dot, doh, and doq transports.

path.description: Path to the RFC 1035 master zone file.

RpzZoneConfig.description: A single Response Policy Zone feed.

source.description: Source URI for this zone (axfr+notify or local path).
